title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: A live summit in San Francisco (June 2026) featuring AI executives, reporters, and security experts discussing the forced recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. Panelists debated implications for the AI pause debate, infrastructure buildout, enterprise adoption, China competition, cybersecurity, and the compute race between OpenAI and Anthropic.
writeup: This recording captures the Big Technology AI Summit held in San Francisco in June 2026, with Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie, and other AI executives, reporters, and security experts. The central topic is the forced recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, which panelists use to frame the AI pause debate. Discussion extends to infrastructure buildout, enterprise adoption, China competition, cybersecurity, and the compute race between OpenAI and Anthropic.
